title: Statement-of-Work
description: A Statement of Work (SOW) defining the scope, deliverables, milestones, and payment terms for a vendor engagement.

VendorName.description: Full legal name of the vendor or consulting firm

ClientName.description: Name of the client organization commissioning the work

SOWNumber.description: Unique SOW identifier or reference number (e.g., SOW-2024-0147)

ContractType.description: Fixed Price, Time and Materials, or Cost Plus

IndustryDomain.description: Industry or domain of the engagement (e.g., Healthcare IT, Financial Services, Manufacturing)

BusinessUnit.description: Internal business unit or department that owns the budget

EngagementType.description: Category of work (e.g., Software Development, Consulting, Staff Augmentation, System Integration, Managed Services)

PaymentTerms.description: Payment lag terms (e.g., Net 30, Net 45, Net 60, Due on Acceptance)

Milestones.description: Payment milestones with amounts and target dates

MilestoneName.description: Descriptive name of the milestone (e.g., Project Kickoff, Design Approval, UAT Complete)

Amount.description: Payment amount due upon milestone acceptance

Deliverables.description: Brief description of deliverables associated with this milestone

AcceptanceCriteria.description: Criteria that must be met for milestone sign-off

Sections.description: Free-form prose sections of the SOW document

Title.description: Section heading (e.g., Scope of Work, Assumptions, Governance)

Content.description: 1-4 paragraphs of prose for this section

ScopeNarrative.description: Optional 2-3 sentence executive summary of the engagement scope and objectives.

RateCardNarrative.description: Optional 1-2 sentence description of billing rates or rate card structure for T and M contracts.

GovernanceNarrative.description: Optional 1-2 sentence description of project governance, reporting cadence, or escalation path.

ChangeControlNarrative.description: Optional 1-2 sentence description of the change order process.

ConfidentialityNarrative.description: Optional 1-2 sentence confidentiality or NDA reference clause.
